title: Enchant Display: Arabic numerals
description: Changes Roman numerals to Arabic for enchantments and makes them more beautiful.
body: ![Demonstration](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/AXiFe4wS/images/a35a99d4db4ec50db4a8d67a5b10c8a575dcbba3.png) ## Enchant Display: Arabic numerals ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/993867255484010617?logo=Discord&logoColor=4791ff&label=%20&labelColor=383838&color=1baec2&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FJNX3rvKYUv) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/906096?logo=curseforge&logoColor=8bc93a&label=Download&labelColor=383838&color=1baec2) ## 🔍 Information 🔍 📄 Versions: 1.14-1.21.X 🗨️ Language: All~~~~ ⭐ Completed: 100% ## 📖 Descriptions 📖 📋 **EN:** Adds beautiful inscriptions for your enchantment level, changes Roman numerals to Arabic, and also corrects the error with "enchantment.level.100". 📋 **RU:** Добавляет красивые надписи для уровня вашего зачарования, изменяет Римские цифры на Арабские, а также исправляет ошибку с "enchantment.level.100". ## ⭐ More Content ⭐
